name: Potatoes with Spiced Chicken Topping
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Chicken (boned and skinned), cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub potatoes; dry and prick with a fork.
2. Bake in a 425°F oven for 55 to 60 minutes, until soft.
3. In a large skillet, heat oil; sauté almonds until golden brown. Add onions and garlic; sauté until tender. Add chicken; cook, stirring, until chicken turns white. Sprinkle with flour; mix well.
4. Combine broth, lemon juice, cinnamon, paprika, salt, and hot pepper sauce in a bowl. Gradually add to the chicken mixture, stirring constantly, until the mixture boils and thickens. Stir in raisins. Simmer for three minutes.
5. Cut an X in the top of baked potatoes; pinch sides of potatoes to fluff. Top with chicken mixture.
